case_title: REGINALD OLIVER VS. CHARLES OTIS MERRITT

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLIVER, REGINALD AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERRITT, CHARLES OTIS AN INDIVIDUAL $6,436.10 PRINCIPAL, $1,093.26 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,754.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLIVER, REGINALD AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLIVER, REGINALD AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT MERRITT, CHARLES OTIS AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
